title: Most school bonds pass in Tuesday’s election. Look up your district
summary_en: Statewide, 61.1% of school bonds passed. Some districts that failed to get bonds passed in November also failed Tuesday.
author: Isabel Lohman
title_cn: 密歇根州周二选举逾六成学区债券提案获得通过
summary_cn: 据布里奇密歇根网站2026年5月7日更新的报道，该网站基于龚沃新闻社数据统计显示，在周二举行的选举中，密歇根州学区债券提案的选民投票通过率为63.8%。

title: More Michigan students pursue trades, but access disparities persist
summary_en: Career and technical education is growing across Michigan as more complete programs tied to in-demand skilled trades. Access differs by district, however, and some are asking voters to approve related bonds this week.
author: Janelle D. James
title_cn: 美国密歇根州就读职业技术教育项目学生规模上升 但教育资源获取差异问题依然存在
summary_cn: 近期，受技能类岗位需求增长驱动，美国密歇根州越来越多学生选择就读职业技术教育（CTE）项目，但全州范围内该类教育资源的获取机会仍不均衡。

title: U-M faculty slam president’s apology for faculty leader’s commencement speech
summary_en: Faculty call for withdrawal of U-M President Grasso’s apology for a commencement speech by the chair of the Faculty Senate. Professor Derek Peterson’s speech lauded pro-Palestinian students while celebrating student activism.
author: Kim Kozlowski
title_cn: 密歇根大学教职人员抨击校长就教职参议院主席毕业典礼发言作出的致歉
summary_cn: 近期，密歇根大学校长多梅尼科·格拉索就该校教职参议院主席德里克·彼得森在周末毕业典礼上的相关发言公开致歉，引发该校教职人员等群体反对，相关群体已发起联署行动要求校方撤回致歉。
